hero.title: Most Important Terms & Conditions (MITC)
hero.subtitle: Summary of key loan terms — read alongside your sanction letter

items.title: 1. Loan amount, tenure & rate
items.content: As specified in the sanction letter and Key Fact Statement (KFS).

items.title: 2. EMI & due date
items.content: Equated Monthly Installment computed on reducing balance. EMI debit dates are typically the 5th of each month.

items.title: 3. Security
items.content: As detailed in the loan agreement — property mortgage / hypothecation of asset / personal guarantee.

items.title: 4. Insurance
items.content: Property and asset insurance must be maintained throughout the loan tenure.

items.title: 5. Fees & charges
items.content: Processing, documentation, stamp duty, valuation, legal, foreclosure and bounce charges as per the Schedule of Charges.

items.title: 6. Penal & default consequences
items.content: Penal interest of 2% per month on overdues. Default may trigger SARFAESI proceedings.
